name: Bel Societe anonyme
summary: Bel Soci√É¬©t√É¬© anonyme produces and distributes cheese in the Americas, Asia-Pacific, Europe, Middle East, and Greater Africa. The company offers its products under core brands, including The Laughing Cow, Kiri, Mini Babybel, Leerdammer, Boursin, Pom'Potes, and GoGo squeeZ. Bel Soci√É¬©t√É¬© anonyme was founded in 1865 and is headquartered in Suresnes, France. Bel Soci√É¬©t√É¬© anonyme is a subsidiary of Unibel SA.
